description: OLS, robust standard errors, clustered SE, and nonlinear regression tests

tests.prompt: Estimate the effect of firm value on investment using OLS
tests.dataset_context: grunfeld dataset: firm, year, inv, value, capital

tests.prompt: Run a linear regression of wages on education and experience with robust standard errors
tests.dataset_context: cps dataset: wage, education, experience, age, gender

tests.prompt: I need to regress sales on advertising spend controlling for market size
tests.dataset_context: marketing dataset: sales, ad_spend, market_size, region, quarter

tests.prompt: Estimate a regression with standard errors clustered by firm
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: y, x1, x2, firm_id, year

tests.prompt: Run OLS with two-way clustering on firm and year
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: return, market_cap, leverage, firm_id, year

tests.prompt: Check the regression assumptions - normality, heteroskedasticity, and autocorrelation
Calculate the VIF values to check for multicollinearity in my regression
tests.dataset_context: multivar_data: outcome, pred1, pred2, pred3, pred4

tests.prompt: Fit an exponential growth model to the population data
Use LOESS to smooth the time series of temperature anomalies
Estimate the relationship between height and weight with HC3 standard errors
tests.dataset_context: anthropometric dataset: height, weight, age, gender
